page: Microsoft Azure L8s_v3 is a storage-optimized virtual machine from the LSv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8370C processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 2.8 GHz. The server is configured with 8 dedicated vCPUs derived from 4 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. It includes 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU, and comes equipped with 2002 GB of local storage.

Benchmark evaluations place the L8s_v3 in the average performance tier for most workloads. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance score is 1899.79, while the multi-core score reaches 7762.97. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 417.03 GB/sec and a large block uncached write bandwidth of 37.8 GB/sec. In database operations, the server achieves a PassMark database score of 4000.39 and processes 8.0 million Redis SET operations per second. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is a relative bottleneck, scoring in the bottom 25% tier at 31.27 GB/sec.

Given its high local storage capacity of 2002 GB paired with 64.0 GB of RAM, the L8s_v3 offers high resource density for storage-heavy applications without requiring external storage attachments. This hardware profile is well-suited for database hosting, Redis caching, static web serving, and moderate data processing tasks that benefit from large local storage and dedicated CPU resources.
description: Microsoft Azure L8s_v3 is a storage-optimized virtual machine from the LSv3 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C x86_64 processor running at 2.8 GHz. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs across 4 physical cores, 64.0 GB of system memory, and 2002 GB of bundled local storage. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, the server delivers balanced, mid-tier performance across standard benchmarks, including a PassMark CPU score of 11432.18 and a Redis SET throughput of 8.0 million operations per second. While multi-threaded decompression shows some performance limitations, its high local storage capacity and dedicated CPU allocation make it highly cost-efficient for storage-intensive workloads. The L8s_v3 is optimized for database hosting, caching layers, and static web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure L8s_v3 is an LSv3-family virtual machine featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB of RAM, and 2002 GB of local storage, optimized for database and storage-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure L8s_v3 features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 2002 GB local storage for database and storage-heavy workloads.
tagline: A storage-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high-capacity local storage for database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 8 dedicated vCPUs and 64 GB RAM
2002 GB of bundled local storage for high-capacity data requirements
Delivers 8.0 million Redis SET operations per second for caching layers
Optimized for database hosting, static web serving, and storage-heavy workloads
